description: This file defines several React functional components: Panel, ErrorPanel, and EmptyPanel. These components are used to render different types of UI panels with customizable content, including error messaging and empty state displays.

methods.name: Panel
methods.description: A generic panel component with a title, optional description, and children content.

methods.name: ErrorPanel
methods.description: An error display panel that shows an error message, optional details, and a retry button.

methods.name: EmptyPanel
methods.description: A panel indicating an empty state with a title, description, and optional action.
